transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Again, the areas in black are the total area covered which we obtained from the mission,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the areas in red are the pieces which we missed due to the deletion of the plane change

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the day early return.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This little piece down here was a oblique pass which we had planned with the pan camera.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It would have taken place on Rev 72 in order to get photographs of Jacendi,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which is an area of particular interest to the geology.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So you can see that we did lose some data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: On the other hand, we did pick up some data that we would not have gotten,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and I think overall the effectiveness of the coverage was about 90% of what we had hoped for pre-mission.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I really want to express the thanks of the photo team to the flight planners here

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and also to Ken for his operation of the cameras during the mission.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I know that it was very confusing to be continually changing the flight plan

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and Ken probably wondered what the hell we were doing with all these on-offs and so on.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But really I think we did a very effective job of recovering almost all of the data that we had planned for the mission.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: May I have the next slide, please?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is a diagram showing what the Apollo 15 coverage was like.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is the planned coverage for the 16 mission,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and in the dotted line is the planned coverage for the 17 mission.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The only reason I show this is to indicate that the areas where we did lose data, unfortunately,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: are in the areas that were not covered by 15 and will not be covered by 17,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: so that the losses, although small, were real.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: May I have the next slide?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Ken, during the film recovery EVA, you reported that the stellar camera glare shield was hung up on the handrail.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'm not 100% clear as to exactly what that situation was.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is the stellar camera glare shield,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and this is a little cover that comes down and covers that when the mapping camera is retracted.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Maybe you've discussed this with the other people here at the center,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but for my own information, I would like to know whether this is the cover that was hung up or this is the cover.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Both of them. The shield at the forward end, that one.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This one?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, the first one you looked at, yeah. That was sticking up.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: That was sticking up, uh-huh.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, but the tip out here was mashed against the handrail.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Mashed against the handrail out along here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, the rail isn't in this picture.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The rail is not installed.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It would have been along here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And this lip was up against it and bent back out of the way.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I see.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was not in the full extend position.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It looked like it was a partial extension.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh-huh.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Could you tell whether this was bent, whether this rail was bent, this extend rail?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, but I think we have a photo that will probably tell you that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I don't remember.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The end of the shield was bent.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Up here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: No.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, in the next section of the accordion.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The next section was bent.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now, whether that rail itself was bent, I didn't notice.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh-huh.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh-huh.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The implication, of course, is that if this, uh, had happened early in the mission and this

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: shield were bent down, uh, we might get excessive light into the stellar camera and our, our background

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: density would be, uh, low, uh, or would be higher than we expected and we might not see

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: as many stars.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the other indication of, uh, malfunction that we had, of course, was in the exposure

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: control on the pan camera and, uh, that, uh, would indicate that, uh, the pictures away

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: from the terminal may be overexposed.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: That situation is also being looked at and, again, we're going to talk about it this afternoon

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: before we actually process the film.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, may I have the next slide?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, this is the information which I have with regard to the laser altimeter operation.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the first row across here is what the nominal mission would have been and the second

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: row is the, uh, actual results from the Apollo 16.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, we had planned a total of 20 hours and a few minutes of operating time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We got 14 hours and a half so that we are down about 25 percent in the total operating time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is the total, uh, revolutions in longitude that we had planned, uh, 10.3 and we got seven

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and a half so again we're down about 25 percent in that regard.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, a total number of firings 3283 and 2106 is the actual number that, uh, was recorded.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So we are down, uh, nearly 30 percent, uh, in the total number of firings.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Also, the number of valid elevation, uh, readings that we got was appreciably, uh, less than the total number of firings.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So that we, the actual mission in terms of altimeter observations, uh, gave us a little bit less than half of what we had actually planned.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, that's, that's really not as serious a, a, uh, shortfall as it sounds just from the numbers.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, because the readings were quite well distributed throughout the mission.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the general operation that we saw on the altimeter, uh, the first several revs were completely nominal.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: All of the elevation readings were valid.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Then it began to fall off about 75 percent, 65 percent, and down to about 60 percent,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: except on the last data pass on rev 62 where it was only about, uh, uh, 10 percent effective.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the, uh, generally what we seem to observe is that there would be one good shot, then one bad shot, then one good, one bad,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and then maybe several good ones in a row.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, we can talk about the reason for that, but, uh, that's more appropriately covered in the systems review tomorrow.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the effect that it will have on the data is simply to give us a, a, a larger spacing between data points.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So far as the, its effect on the reduction of the photography is concerned, that's absolutely inconsequential.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So far as its effect on the, uh, correlation between the tracking and gravity data and the, uh, profiles,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: it's a little bit, uh, more of concern.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, they do have a little bit more smoothing to do between the data points that they got,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but essentially I don't think that it really hurts us so far as the scientific return, uh, from the mission is concerned.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, I would like to say, uh, just a word or so about the utilization of the photography.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, it has been proceeding much more slowly than I had anticipated

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: in reducing the pictures from Apollo 15.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: However, the work which is being done by the ACIC and St. Louis

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: is indicating that the photography, photographic reduction,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: will provide, uh, positional coordinates of features on the lunar surface

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: with the, uh, the accuracy of 10 to 12 meters in position and in elevation.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And that seems to coincide very well with what we had predicted pre-mission.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So, uh, we are quite confident that, uh, that we're getting very good information from the pictures in that regard.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the tracking data, uh, generally, uh, is consistent within an orbital pass,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but we do find, uh, discrepancies of, uh, up to a kilometer between adjacent photographic passes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So that the, uh, reduction of the photographs is giving us a much better tie between orbital, uh, passes

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: than we get from the, from the tracking data, uh, itself.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, consequently, we do expect eventually to come up with a, an internally consistent coordinate system,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: reference system, figure of the moon, with an accuracy on the order of 12 to 15 meters.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, that's, uh, highly gratifying to me.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, so far as the pan-camera utilization is concerned,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: there have been some, uh, map compilations done.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the indicated precision of those is on the order of three meters,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which, again, is about what we had expected.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But that is a precision and not an accuracy number because, uh,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: of the geometric problems with the pan-camera photography.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: However, so far as the resolution of the pan-camera is concerned,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that has held up to just about what we had expected,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: uh, from one and a half to three meters at the, uh, sub-vehicle point

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and decreasing off to about five to six meters at the limits of the, of the film.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, so, so far as, uh, our indications at the moment are that the results from 16 are quite satisfactory.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We do have these problems that we have to resolve in the processing of the film.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, uh, once that is done, we will be able to say exactly what we did obtain.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But, again, I want to express the photo team's thanks to you particularly, Ken,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: for the, uh, uh, time and attention, uh, that you gave to the camera operation

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the results that we have obtained.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thanks, Fred. Any questions, uh, before?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Could you, do you have a plot of the, uh, altimetry?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: You know, last time someone had drawn up a rough hand sketch of, of the altimetry,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and what, did anyone do that this time?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the profiles?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes, sir.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, I don't, Ken.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think maybe, uh, Sjogren has one of those, uh, and, uh, I don't know.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is he here?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Bill?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, Bill.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do you have a plot?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, I thought you had one.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: He'll show that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, and these, uh, particles that you found in the mapping camera, that,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: is that handfuls, or, or a couple of shavings, or?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, I don't know how extensive they are, they were, uh, they were enough to concern the, uh,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: uh, the people in the processing lab.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, uh, all I know, that's about all that I know about it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We're supposed to have a review of that this afternoon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, it could have, uh, very serious implications, obviously.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, uh, one, one thing that I seem to recall from the, uh, during the mission, is that we

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: had apparently more film left for post-TEI photography than we had anticipated.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And what that could mean, of course, is that the camera was not passing film when we thought

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: it was, and things were being chewed up pretty badly inside.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So, uh, we're gonna have to look that over very carefully before we go ahead with the processing

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: of the film.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We expect the, uh, camera contractor to, uh, look at the shavings and tell us where he

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: thinks they came from, and that may give us a better clue as to what they are, actually

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: are.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do you have a processing schedule yet?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I, I guess it's all in advance to figure out what to do next.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, everything is on a hold until this afternoon, yeah, after we're meeting this afternoon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Assuming you're determined to go ahead and develop it, will it take you three or four days

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: to process?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, I think the, the anticipated schedule was to have, uh, the original film processed

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: within this week, and all of the duplicate copies within four weeks of the distributed.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Perhaps you stated, what is the accuracy of the altimeter?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The, uh, least count of the altimeter is, uh, one meter.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, the accuracy is, uh, dependent, uh, pretty much upon the slope in the area, which is aluminum,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and, uh, a little bit, uh, on the albedo in the area, which is illuminated.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, in general, I think it's fair to say that, uh, the reading that we get from the altimeter

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: will be correct, uh, to within three to five meters.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Have, have you figured out what to do with the pan camera for processing?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Got a correction for the, for the exposure?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, I don't know what has been figured out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We had a group working on it last week, and they're going to give us a report right after

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: this meeting, and we'll decide what to do.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, I could, I could comment, uh, the photo lab has made their recommendation, you know,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: to fraud back, and, uh, they think that there will be some slight loss near the generator,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: if they could do that, uh, in other words, that they can handle the over exposure,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but at some penalty, where we have .

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The situation is really that, uh, near the terminator, the pictures are underexposed anyhow,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: because we can't open the slit wide enough and so on.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, so the camera was wide open at the terminator, uh, but it was open wider than it should have been

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: when we were away from the terminator, so that the terminator pictures are a little bit underexposed,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: then they become properly exposed, and after that, uh, they will be overexposed.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So what we would really like, of course, is a variable, uh, processing, uh, through each photo pass,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but that's probably not a feasible thing to even contemplate.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thanks, Fred.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Next subject will be the particles and fields of the subsatellite,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and, uh, I think Jim McCoy is going to cover that. Is he here?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Ah, there he is.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We got a mic right over there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Can we add anything at all?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, they'll, they'll project it up there in the back booth if you want to.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, Dick?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Where's, where's Baldwin?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Would you, could you get this projected up there?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Of course.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I guess I'll put the mic on.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, can you hear me okay?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, I guess, uh, quickly, the subsatellite was

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: deployed successfully.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Our spin rate was phenomenal.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, I guess I'll put the mic on.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, I guess, uh, quickly, the subsatellite was deployed successfully.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Uh, our spin rate was phenomenal, about five and a ninth second, uh, spin period.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Quickly, the sub-satellite was deployed successfully. Our spin rate was

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: nominal about 5 and 8 second spin period. We want five plus or minus a couple. The

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: attitude was good. According to preliminary indications in the sun sensor,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: we have a couple of degrees tip off from the ecliptic, which is well within the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: limits we needed. The operation of all of the electrostatic analyzers and both

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: solid-state telescopes is good. We don't seem to have the noise problem that we

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: had on Apollo 15 in a couple of the analyzers, and we've gotten rid of our

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: accumulator counting error that was characteristic of 15. It's given us some

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: problems in our data analysis now from that satellite. The quick-look results on

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: our first magnetotail pass indicated, again, the presence of these rather unexpected,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: rather high fluxes of low-energy protons, which have also been seen now with a new

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: IMP series I satellite experiment too. And on this magnetotail pass, we appear to have the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: remnants of a small solar event in the form of some high-energy solar cosmic ray

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: electrons and protons around, which should prove interesting for our shadow

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: interpretation, particularly on electric fields in the magnetotail. Beyond that, if they have those slides

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: there, I'd like to briefly describe some of the results we got from Apollo 15, which would hope to be

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: similar for this one. Our primary experiment was to examine particle shadow configurations in the

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: magnetotail. That'd be while we're passing through this region back here, where we are in the Earth's magnetic field,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and use that to examine the question of openness and access through the magnetotail to the magnetic field lines and

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: ultimately to the Van Allen belts, where theory generally holds that the Van Allen radiation must somehow come in and then be trapped and

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: accelerated. The degree of connection back here with the interplanetary field has been in quite a bit of question and briefly stated the Apollo 15 results indicate pretty

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: clearly that at least most of the time at the latitudes where we passed through the tail, of course we only have a couple of passes, that these field lines are in fact open

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: out here connect directly into the interplanetary field and have direct access of solar cosmopolitan particles.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We have also observed the existence of a plasma sheet which is known to form in closer to the Earth to extend out to the Moon in the distance.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And on at least a couple of occasions we have observed cross tail electric fields which are important to theoretical models accounting for aurora and for acceleration of particles into the radiation belts.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: An unexpected observation which we found interesting was 30 keV or thereabouts protons in very large numbers which we observe quite frequently back in the magnetotail and also observe outside the magnetotail in very similar fluxes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Our first feeling was that these must also be some component of the solar cosmic ray proton spectrum.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: their, of course, very low energy would be stopped by even the thinnest piece of material.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But the numbers of them and the consistency of their flux densities make them very attractive as probably being indicative, quite indicative of the source that they come from and the mechanism bringing them.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: A further examination, however, of the locations where we see them and of the almost constant intensities that we see almost force us to the conclusions that they must somehow be protons from the outer Van Allen belt region here,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which are somehow coming loose from the Earth's field and moving outward and then getting onto the interplanetary fields and then moving out to where we see them in perhaps an inverse process of the postulated process where we bring solar cosmic ray particles in from the Sun to populate the Van Allen belts.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We were anxiously awaiting getting our data and now our computer program at Berkeley and Schaefer. We can examine this in detail. We've unfortunately been delayed in that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So, if I have the next slide, I'll show you one orbit of data from the telescopes when these very steady fluxes of protons were present.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And during this period and actually for a period of a couple of orbits earlier, these fluxes were almost constant. There is some changing here. There is a very, very slight shadowing of protons, not very much at all. This is mostly an electron phenomenon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But then these particles essentially turn off as though somebody closed a valve. And this is characteristic of the way they behave. When they appear, they're suddenly there. And when they disappear, they're gone just as fast.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we're very hopeful that we'll be able to make some sense out of what turns these things on and off and determine where they're coming from and what the mechanism is, presumably now in the magnetosphere.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, I think I'll just throw it open to any questions now.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: What is the lifetime estimate of the 16th?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I wish you hadn't brought that up.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The next speaker will get that for us.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We had been very hopeful of getting another dozen or a couple of dozen magnetosphere passes out of this satellite since it works so beautifully.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think we're going to cover that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Chris said it was going to stay up there forever, so it better.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: If it doesn't crash, we also will.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Then the world's going to come to an end pretty shortly, I'm over.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We'll see.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Any questions about particles and fuels?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, let's continue on with subsatellite and get on the planet.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We didn't say anything about it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I assume that our satellite is sending out good data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is batteries charging okay and everything?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's not running into the problem that the 15 guys had?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Or was that normal for the...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It seems to be a little bit better at battery charging.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The machine is working.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, and all the detectors are operating?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: As far as we know, yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's just that it's got a short lifetime.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, let's see.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think Larry Sharp is going to take Coleman's place, right?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Magnetometer.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The objectives of the magnetometer experiment are essentially three-fold.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: First is to measure and map the remnant magnetism on the lunar surface.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Second is to map the electrical conductivity of the lunar interior.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Finally, study the various aspects of the Moon's interaction with the fields and particles in its environment.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The wide scope of these objectives is made possible by the geometry of the Moon's orbit as it passes through three fundamentally different regions of space.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: For example, to get the spatial variations of remnant magnetism on the lunar surface, one must be in the geomagnetic tail,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: where the temporal variations are almost absent in the magnetic field.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Very steady situation.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The initial orbit of the subsatellite was somewhat lower than Apollo 15 in the inclination of about 11 degrees instead of 28.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I'd like to show you the predictions of the orbit.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Right over that side.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: On the back side.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Back side over.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Ha, Ha, Ha.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, we've plotted days past deployment.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Versus the parallel altitude.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We started out here in pretty good shape, about 97 kilometers or 97 by 123, I guess.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the prediction was a very rapid drop down to 30-some, back up in good shape.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: No real trouble until, here's the ground line, until about 200 days when the probability was 50-50 of a crash.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here are the error bars here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: You can say the probability was maybe one chance in 10 of a crash here and maybe one chance in 5.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We've updated this plot.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the odds have changed considerably.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This was the prediction.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Notice the timescale has been expanded greatly.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: These are hours now instead of days.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here was the initial prediction at 37 kilometers, and here are the actual data points.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This one was taken this morning, around in here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And if you can extrapolate by eye, it looks like we have about four days left.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I guess Bill Sogren's taking 50-50 odds that it'll crash if anyone's in the betting mood.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's possible that we'll skim the surface and come back out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But even if we make it through this one, that next dip is going to probably finish us off, which is most unfortunate.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Out of curiosity, it might be out of your field, but how come our prediction didn't match the actuality?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I mean, we...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We don't know the gravity field that well, and that's the business of this subsatellite initially to come to the gravity field.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: You're going to come to that field, I think.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we've been screaming like that about these paths that don't go long out here at MSC to try to drive that point home so many times,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and I think we're really seeing it come.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Man, it just goes to show you can't redo six months of planning in two days.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, in any event, we have one month's worth of good data, which will add to our Apollo 15 results.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And to get some idea of what we're doing with this data, I'd like to show the first slide,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which represents an average of 17 different orbits taken when the moon was in the Earth's magnetotail.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we've plotted the moon's longitude along the horizontal and the magnetic field in gammas along the vertical.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: These numbers are representative of the Earth's tail field.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, of course, if you subtract out an average value, this residual would represent the lunar surface field.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, of course, the big result is this really huge magnetic dip going over the Vondegraaff crater

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: or a region right near the Vondegraaff crater.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Also, the other initial result we got out of 15 data was that most of the dips in the magnetic field

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: would seem to be clearly associated with craters lying within a few degrees of the ground track defined by the orbit of the subsatellite.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We've numbered the seven most obvious local minima and named five of them with associated craters.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now, initial results from Apollo 16 show the same type of structure, although we don't see anything as big as Vondegraaff.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We see we do go over Korolev again.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's where the orbits intersect when we're in the tail.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we see a few other Hertzsprung and Pavlov-type bumps.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: One is with a little tiny crater called Stein and one near Mendelev.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now, if you repeat this procedure several times with different lunations,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: say you cover different tracks over the moon, and this allows a contour map to be made.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So if I could have the next slide, this shows the ground track from where we found the anomaly.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here was one over Hertzsprung, Korolev.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here's Vondegraaff.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: You can see we went right close to the northern border, Pavlov, and one over Milne.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So it was a pretty good one-to-one correspondence with large craters.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The initial 11 orbit, of course, is much near the equator.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The inclination goes up to plus or minus 11.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So we saw one over Korolev, and Stein crater is located right about here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's not too big.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The next map shows a compilation of a lot of these linear profiles.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Next slide.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Into a contour map.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's a little hard to read the contours.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: You can see this big black blotch here is a result of contours stacked on top of each other

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: near this Vondegraaff anomaly.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: You can see the numbers are hard to make out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: You can see the structure over Korolev, a hint of some structure over Hertzsprung,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the southern sea over here is actually an enhancement, sticking out of the moon, so to speak.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: You can see Milne shows a definite structure.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Now, the Apollo 16 results should enable us to expand this map.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We'll get better resolutions throughout this area and be able to extend it along in here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We'll probably still have a gap down in this region.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Harry, can you give us an idea of the gradient you're measuring there?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, yes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The numbers presented in the chart, if you can see them,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: are measured in tenths of gamma at an altitude of 100 kilometers.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So, for example, a good representative value is about 30,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the zero we've arbitrarily chosen at the bottom of the Vondegraaff dip,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: since this is the lowest value of magnetism we observe.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We just call it zero and scale everything relative to it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So, if you're at 100 kilometers, you'll see a three gamma dip going over Vondegraaff on the average.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, we were fortunate.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Also, the near side of the moon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Does the gravity profile have any, can you correlate?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I've looked at the gravity profile, and it doesn't seem to correlate at all.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We don't.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Actually, the laser data correlates better with, you don't, there's no gravity on the back side, okay,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but on the front side.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I understand.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It correlates pretty well with the laser data,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which shows a great big hole here in the back side of the moon around Vondegraaff,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and that's where we get our big hole,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but I can't see any scientific justification for connecting the two results.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I will add, let's remind you, the gamma ray.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes, that's true.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The secondary peak is also in Vondegraaff.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I don't know what it means.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It could be an alien star base or something.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Anyway, the next slide shows the front side of the moon,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and it's upside down.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The thing to contrast is the much smoother nature of the,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: could we do a 180 on the slide, please?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Can you hear me?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Could we have a, turn the slide around, please?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, he's on a coffee break.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, here you go.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Anyway, the front side of the moon is much, much smoother than the back side.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The variations are, oh, an order of a factor of 10 smooth.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We don't see very much structure at all.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's very hard to even draw contours.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Can you sort out the differences in that and the effects of running through the,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: the Earth's magnetic field effects?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Since you're, the front side is always close to the Earth,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: can you sort out,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: are we really measuring magnetic variations on the back side,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: caused by being on the back side,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: not due to our measuring environment?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The Earth's tail field is very, very constant

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: when you're in the,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: a good second, when you're away from the neutral sheet,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and that's where all this data is taken.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, I guess we never got the front slide complete.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, this is a blow-up of the Van de Graaff region

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: in an attempt to pinpoint the exact source of this large anomaly.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We kind of suspected it was over the crater itself,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: since we had always put forth a theory

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that what we were actually observing in these dips

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: was some sort of a meteorite impact

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that caused a rather uniformly magnetized crust

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that suddenly have holes in it,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and we're seeing the equivalent dipole

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: of what was left over,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and this kind of shoots holes in the theory.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We see a, this is the BX component,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which is the radial component,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and a plus number indicates a value sticking into the moon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So you see this rather large hole here,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: magnetically, in between two craters,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and if you look at various models of double dipoles and stuff,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: it just doesn't quite fit.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The other components, B sub Y and B sub Z,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: show that it can't be one of these angling dipoles from the crater.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And presently, we're now conducting the same sort of studies

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: over the rest of the anomalies to see if it checks out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I just, just yesterday, completed the one over Korolev,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and that one is right in the middle of the crater,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which is promising for the Shakti magnetization theory.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: How much validity do we have in the ground track data?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: How much validity do we have in the ephemers?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I understand there's no chance that we could be off by...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, never, anything like that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It might be off a kilometer or two, like I said.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But now you're talking about the final reading there,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that's 9 or 10 kilometers.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So it doesn't seem much chance.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We'll get maybe one more.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: As the subsatellite comes crashing down to the moon,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: the last 10 kilometers should give us a good swath of data,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which will give us another high-resolution plot like this.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Other than that, we're kind of out of luck.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, thank you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Question?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's the front side of the moon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, and our coverage from Apollo 11 will extend.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, I believe this is the equator across here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, I'm sorry.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, this is zero degrees.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, and we go from zero to 90 east to 90 west.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's the terminator.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is the southern sea region,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which is about the only distinctive feature on the front side, per se,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and even that's on the terminator.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And again, these are relatively high values of magnetic fields sticking out of the moon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So you might say that the southern sea is a highly magnetized region.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Notice the 16th site is out of our coverage,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: as were all the Apollo landing sites.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: You have about three gamma delta on the back side.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: What are we seeing on the front side?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, most of these values are about 30, 28, 27,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which means they're all three gamma higher than zero at Vandegraaff.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So I would say the maximum plus or minus is about a half a gamma on the whole front side.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Why do you remember these elongate parallel to the track?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is a function of not having quite enough data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Instead of making physical-looking contours,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: we drew actual contours with the data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And obviously, if there's a little bit of offset from one orbit to the next,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: it's going to result in elongated contours.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: If we fixed this up and made some intelligent-looking guesses,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: they would be much more circular.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Do you have a data on the Apollo 12 and the 15th and the 16th surface?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes, with 12, 14, 15, yes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: How do you compare it with the information of the surface?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, you see, the surface data deals with much smaller scale-sized phenomena.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And so there's really no one-to-one correlation.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I suppose that the...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, the Apollo 12 site is supposed to be...

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, if we could be sure that over a region of 100 kilometers

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that the average field was 38 gamma, which no one would bet on,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: then we could make some interesting predictions about other places on the moon.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But I suspect if you went down to Apollo 12 and went 100 meters away,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: you'd find a much different value of a magnetic field.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We know it's the case.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Look at Apollo 14.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: They went one kilometer, and they went from 43 gamma to 103 gamma.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So who's to say what's a representative value for the magnetic field in a given area?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: How about 15?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Apollo 15, they saw a steady field of 6 plus or minus 4 gamma, which is essentially zero.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But there again, you know, behind the next boulder, probably would be 100 gamma, probably, you know.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the results on 16, I thought, were tremendous.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The tremendous gradients they got between one place and another.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But that 313 gamma field really surprised me as far as getting a value that large.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yes, question there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Have you seen any distinctive features about the correlate,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which might make the distinction that it was, say, a hard spot

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that it would have been near the surface and the necessary soil covering,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which would change the surface temperature at that point,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which would then change the temperature?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: No, I'm not a geologist type.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, I already know about the surface.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: That would change the temperature.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It would seem to me that the younger a crater was,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: the more chance it would have to produce a good, clean-cut signature

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: on the magnetic field data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: For example, Van de Graaff itself looks like a fairly young crater

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: because there's very few secondary craters in the bottom of it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So it looks fairly young, whereas things like Hertzsprung seem to be fairly old.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: They're well-blotched with secondary craters.
