transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: What is the distance from the center of Van de Graaff to the center of the anomaly?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's 88 kilometers from the northern rim.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So from the center of Van de Graaff, it's about 130, 140 kilometers.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Any other questions?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay, thank you, Larry.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And, yeah, got a question?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: No.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Last subject will be the transponder.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Bill Sogren.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is a gravity experiment.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we monitor the gravity by just monitoring the velocity of the spacecraft

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: or the LEM or the subsatellite.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Of course, on this particular mission, we lost our LEM data on impact

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: because it started tumbling.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And so that data was lost.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We do, however, have the CSM in the low-altitude orbit,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which is very interesting data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here's the orbital track.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And hopefully I can get this aligned.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: About like that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This profile just below it is the gravity anomaly that was detected.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This line right here represents zero gravity central isostatic equilibrium.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And anything below it, of course, that would be negative gravity deviations.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here we are, Ptolemaeus, going essentially over the center with the track.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we can see the large negative anomaly again, almost 100 milligals.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here we see some highland material where we have a positive.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Then we drop down into a relative low in between these two old craters,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: the Parkus and Albatagnius.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And then a high in here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: At this point, this is the Descartes landing site.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we're actually at about a 50 milligal negative anomaly in that region.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: There's some nice correlations here with the laser altimetry measurements.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'll show them in the next profile.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But this is continuous.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I've just taken one small section here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We have this thing from limb to limb.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So about 110 longitude plus to 110 minus.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And essentially, three revs.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: From rev 3 through rev 11.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's eight revs.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Eight revs of data that are pretty good.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And then they started their station keeping.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And data kind of got garbaged up a lot.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: All the maneuvering was going on.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Let me point out one kind of interesting thing here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Notice that Ptolemaeus here has an anomaly much lower than Nubium.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Although Nubium, which is this region right in here,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: this Marinubium right in here, is still at about minus 50 milligals.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here's an altimeter profile.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And going right to the Nubium Ptolemaeus region again,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: we see that Nubium elevation here is some, by the way,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: the scale here is two kilometers per heavy line.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So we've dropped down here almost two kilometers

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: from the floor of Ptolemaeus to the floor of Nubium.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yet the gravity anomaly is just the opposite.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The Ptolemaeus is some 50 milligals lower than the Nubium region.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And another interesting point is, Fred, on these ACIC maps,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Nubium is shown a kilometer higher than Ptolemaeus.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And here we are two kilometers lower.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So we're talking about three kilometers discrepancy

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: in just that little area right there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So I think some of these guys were talking about the right thing

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: when they said we really didn't know the altitudes too well.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think that shows up quite dramatically

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: when you look at the low sun angle view

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: as you approach the Terminator,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: the things that were in Nubium didn't show up

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: until significantly after we anticipated.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We missed our times on those things a great deal,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and that could only be called

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: by having a discrepancy in our relative heights.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is not just, this is Rev. 28.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We've looked at, there are five real good tracking,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: laser tracking passes over this region,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and we've looked at three of them,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and all three show the same consistency of the drop there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Other interesting thing here,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Procolorum, Tranquilitatis, Frecunditatis,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: they all seem to be about on the same level.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Smithii, again, being a low, about four and a half kilometers,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that was the same thing on Apollo 15 when we passed over it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was some four and a half kilometers below,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that's mean radius here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And we're still referencing this to a 1738, well, 0.1 radius off the CG.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: If you take this stuff and start fitting it to an optical center

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: with a CG offset,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that you do indeed get the two-kilometer shift again

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: of the CG being closer to the Earth by some two kilometers.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Let's say that tranquility is about two and a half kilometers

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: lower than Descartes.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, here's the landing site right in here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And this is, we had a negative gravity anomaly in here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, kind of according to this,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: maybe that's the situation,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: because it looks like a topographic lobe.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is the backside.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We had some, these are the limbs where the data was missing.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: These are taken from those, this data is taken from that Thrift printout

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that we get in real time, and there's gaps in the data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: These will be filled in once they get the station tapes delivered.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But we can see the crater Hertz sprung here very evidently

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: with the central peak or something in it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: You don't have any data in that 120-degree region, huh?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Not now.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We should have it next week or so, whenever they get the tapes here and the goose.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: One of the things that, well, on Apollo 15, there was a definite,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: well, centered about 180.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: There was a definite big trough in here

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: which went down about some four and a half kilometers.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was very jagged.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But it was centered just about here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And on Apollo 16 now, we do not really see that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We see this highland material here, which we had on 15.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: That started about in here and showed a marked high region in there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And this is holding on 16 also.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So this is kind of consistent with 15.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Here's another, this is orbit 38 on the backside.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'll just kind of lay it there to show you some of the consistency.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This is 10 orbits later.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The profile is almost there.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Smith, the eye.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Oh, here we have some data in that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: So there's your data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I don't know.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Were you looking for something particular?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, I was looking for something around 105.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Probably not particular.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Nothing.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I do have some data on the sub-satellite from Apollo 15,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but I don't know if that's the time to really show here.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think I've shown enough stuff on 16, huh?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Yeah, well, I'd like to stick to 16.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Any of the problems we have or any of the data that we got for the crew.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, I'm very happy with all the data we've gotten on 16,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the sub-satellite on 16, like Larry mentioned just before me,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: looks pretty grim.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Although there was an OD solution just run out about an hour ago

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: where the last state vector was used as the position for running out the lifetime program.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And the lifetime program, if we believe that 15-8 model that we had used initially back there

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: when we ejected that thing,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: it says that this thing should come back up.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It still says it's not going to crash.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: But this will be a very interesting thing to watch the next couple of days, I can say.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's all right.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: We own the seismometers up and ready.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Well, it's 50.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I asked Kovach about that,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and I don't know whether he can speak for length or not,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but I told him it's 50 pounds,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and whether he can actually see an impact of 50 pounds,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think that's all it weighs.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The central station.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Let's see.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It should hit about maybe some 20 or 30 degrees west longitude

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and 5 or 6 degrees north.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Is that right, Dick?

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Something like that.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: About 5 or 6 north latitude and about 30 west.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: That's what it looks like, that linear extrapolation.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you, Bill.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you, gentlemen, for attending.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: This concludes our scientific debrief,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and I'd like to thank the crew for giving their time up to come on over

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: to give us some information and also learn some things of what happened.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Okay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Let me say something for the crew.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I want to commend Ken for the way that he operated the sim bay.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I don't think you'll ever find a guy who's either more interested in it

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: or more aware of what the operational problems were

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and who could do a better job.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: He really did an outstanding job, and I think he's well done.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The other thing I'd like to say is since I've been on this program,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I've been continually impressed with the importance of what we're doing

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: in our support of you guys.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: These experiments, they look way out right now,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and they're difficult for the man in the street to relate to,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but my feeling is from some of the things I've seen here

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and from the thrust of science and technology in this country

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that in our lifetime, and I won't want to say when,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: but I imagine it's going to be a damn sight sooner than anybody even here in this room can imagine,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: there are going to be practical applications of some of these discoveries that have been made

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that will affect every one of us, and I think you're to be congratulated.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: The other thing is that I get out of all this that I think the United States ought to be spending

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: two to three times the amount of money that we are spending on basic research and development

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and applied research and development,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and I think that if you really look at the big picture of our energy requirements

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: for clean energy in the future in order to improve the life of human beings on this planet,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: we ought to do that and get on with it.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: During the next couple of months,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: we'll probably have an opportunity to talk to a lot of people

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: that help to have some influence

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: or shape the pattern of our program and related programs,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and I would appreciate it very much.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'm sure we all could use the data.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: As you find out things, we realize that you have preliminary data today,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and a lot of the things are only hints and suggestions of things to come.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I would personally appreciate it very much

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: if you'd give us a call periodically and tell us what you found.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It's too easy for us to go through here

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and at the end of a week or so walk off

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and never really know what happened

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and never know what kind of data came out.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I think that makes us very poor salesmen.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I think you could help us do the job

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: to kind of feed back the quality of the data that you've been getting

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: if you could keep us informed.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Please don't ever feel like you're interfering with our operation

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: or don't be inhibited to call us.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: If we can't come to the phone and take the data

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: or talk to you about it,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: the secretary will take the number and we'll be glad to call you back.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And if there's any time when you have some question about the data,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: it doesn't matter how trivial it may seem to you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: If you want to look at some data

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and you're curious to know whether we've ever seen a particular observation

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: or whether the spacecraft was moving at the time your data was taken

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: or I don't care how far out it might seem to you,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: questions are pretty cheap

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and not asking questions can be very expensive.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And so please feel like our job isn't finished

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: until you guys have all the information you can use.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And I would like for you to feel like you can call any time.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you very much.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I'd like to say, give you my thanks also.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: I was very pleased with the way all the gear worked,

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: especially my part on the lunar surface

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and the part I saw of Ken in orbit.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: It was just a real pleasure to have him placed all this stuff for all you people

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: and glad it's working so well.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: And thanks for the opportunity of going.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: If you can gin up another one, I'll be glad to go along again.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you.

transcript_title: Department Of War Release 3 Aaro061226 Dod 111764902 1920x1080 9000k
text: Thank you.
